instructions.instruction: Run `terraform validate` before `tflint` so provider-schema and type errors are caught first; NEVER treat a clean tflint result as complete validation.
Read references/security_checklist.md and references/best_practices.md BEFORE running any security scan, so findings can be remediated with the documented patterns.
Report every security finding with an exact file:line and a cross-reference to the security_checklist.md section that explains it; never report an untraceable warning.
Validate from the root configuration that calls a module, using realistic variable values; ALWAYS avoid validating modules in isolation as the sole check.
When a validation tool is missing, inform the user what is missing and why, provide the install command, and ask before continuing; do not silently skip a required step.
Route HIGH and CRITICAL security findings to a human review step before merge; NEVER use Checkov or tfsec exit codes as the sole security gate.
